sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Banco Santander SA (ADR) stock faces pressure amid European banking sector volatility and shifting interest rate expectations
feed.summary: Banco Santander SA (ADR) is navigating challenges from slowing loan growth and regulatory scrutiny in European markets, while US investors are looking at its Latin American exposure and digital banking push as potential growth drivers. The company's robust deposit growth provides stability, but the European Central Bank's policy stance and potential margin compression pose headwinds. Despite these pressures, Santander's strong capital position and diversification make it an interesting watch for US investors.

feed.title: Generation Income Properties Ends Strategic Alternatives Review, Will Remain Independent and Focus on Portfolio Management
feed.summary: Generation Income Properties, Inc. (NASDAQ: GIPR) announced the conclusion of its strategic alternatives review, deciding to remain an independent, publicly traded entity. The Special Committee, initially formed to evaluate options including sale or merger, was dissolved after determining that focusing on disciplined portfolio management and addressing upcoming debt and preferred equity maturities is currently in the best interest of shareholders. The company will continue its engagement with Cantor Fitzgerald & Co. as financial advisor and remains open to future strategic opportunities.

feed.title: Alteogen licenses drug delivery tech to Biogen for $579 million
feed.summary: Alteogen Inc. has licensed its ALT-B4 drug delivery technology to Biogen Inc. for the development and commercialization of subcutaneous formulations of biologics. Under the agreement, Alteogen will receive an upfront payment of $20 million, with potential milestone payments up to $549 million, and royalties on net sales. This deal follows a similar recent agreement with Tesaro, a GSK subsidiary, underscoring Alteogen's position in the biotechnology industry.

feed.title: Six Flags names Richard Haddrill as executive chairman
feed.summary: Six Flags Entertainment Corporation has appointed Richard Haddrill as its executive chairman, effective immediately, alongside Marilyn Spiegel as Lead Independent Director. Haddrill, known for leading Bally Technologies and other companies to significant growth, joins Six Flags amidst a leadership overhaul and financial challenges. The company, facing a 54% stock decline over the past year despite a recent recovery, aims to leverage Haddrill's expertise to improve its financial position and strategic direction.

feed.title: CoStar Stock at $41: Here’s Why Numbers Point to 150% Bull Case
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) stock is trading near its 52-week low despite 59 consecutive quarters of double-digit revenue growth and strong performance from its Homes.com platform. Analysts see significant upside, with a mean target of $64.89, and TIKR's model projects a 150% total return to $103.65 by 2030, driven by expanding free cash flow and Homes.com subscriber growth. The company's $1.5 billion share repurchase program and confirmed residential profitability in 2026 further support a bullish outlook, though Homes.com subscriber growth remains a key variable to monitor.

feed.title: MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL LAUNCHES ALL-INCLUSIVE EXPERIENCE ON LAS VEGAS STRIP
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is launching an all-inclusive experience on the Las Vegas Strip at Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino, starting at $330 plus tax for a two-night stay for two guests. This new bundle combines hotel accommodations, daily resort fees, dining, entertainment, and parking into a single upfront price, aiming to offer guests a convenient and hassle-free way to enjoy a Las Vegas vacation. Bookings are available now for stays beginning April 6th, with dynamic pricing and no blackout dates, allowing for broad accessibility throughout the year.

feed.title: Spruce Point Capital Management Announces Investment Opinion: Releases Report and Strong Sell Research Opinion on Bunge Global, SA (NYSE: BG)
feed.summary: Spruce Point Capital Management has issued a "Strong Sell" research opinion on Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG), citing significant downside risk of 55%-80%. The report claims Bunge is a "non-economic agribusiness roll-up" with a substantial capital deficit, facing core challenges in its oilseeds business and having wildly missed EBITDA projections post-Viterra acquisition. Spruce Point believes Bunge's financial leverage is much higher than reported and criticizes the Viterra deal as disappointing and potentially mismanaged.

feed.title: U.S. bank to launch India GCC with major Chennai office lease
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp is entering India by establishing a Global Capability Center (GCC) in Chennai, leasing over 650,000 sq ft of office space. This move, supported by a build-operate-transfer model with Cognizant, aims to bolster its technology, analytics, and back-office operations and involves plans to hire 3,000 to 5,000 employees over the next five years. The expansion highlights India's growing importance as a hub for global financial institutions seeking cost efficiencies and a skilled workforce.

feed.title: Project Spotlight: UA Local 464 and UA Local 16 delivered the processed piping at Costco’s chicken processing plant in Omaha — a major facility supplying a significant share of Costco’s rotisserie chicken nationwide. Proven union skill on large-scale projects
feed.summary: UA Local 464 and UA Local 16 successfully handled the processed piping for Costco's sizable chicken processing plant in Omaha. This facility is crucial for supplying a significant portion of Costco's nationwide rotisserie chicken demand. The project highlights the proven expertise of union workers in managing large-scale operations.

feed.title: Pet Partners and the Baxter Foundation Expand Therapy Animal Programs to Support 100,000 Patients and Healthcare Workers in Two-Year Pilot
feed.summary: Pet Partners and the Baxter Foundation have partnered to launch a two-year pilot program expanding therapy animal access in healthcare settings. This initiative aims to reach 100,000 patients and healthcare workers in regions like Northern California, Upstate New York, and Greater Chicago, IL. The partnership will focus on increasing therapy animal visits, enhancing volunteer training, and conducting research on the impact of therapy animals to strengthen healthcare resilience and provide comfort.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPLORES LEADERSHIP, TRANSFORMATION, AND THE FUTURE OF MOBILITY WITH FORD CEO JIM FARLEY
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price's podcast "The Angle" features an interview with Ford CEO Jim Farley, where they discuss leadership, strategic reinvention, and the realities of electrification in the automotive industry. Farley shares insights from his career and experience leading Ford through significant industry changes. This episode is part of a series focusing on C-suite leaders navigating financial markets and evolving industries.

feed.title: Ranchland outsources fund operations to SEI for growth
feed.summary: SEI (NASDAQ: SEIC) announced that Ranchland Capital Partners has selected SEI to provide outsourced fund administration and investor services for its alternative fund offerings. This partnership aims to support Ranchland's accelerated growth by leveraging SEI's operational capabilities, technology, and controls. The collaboration will allow Ranchland to focus on investment execution, distribution, and client relationships across its ranchland real-asset strategies, benefiting from SEI's scalable infrastructure and enhanced transparency.

feed.title: 570 judges pick 353 real estate projects shaping 129 markets
feed.summary: CoStar Group announced the winners of its fifth annual CoStar Impact Awards, recognizing 353 commercial real estate projects and transactions from 2025 across 129 global markets. These awards highlight projects that have significantly influenced their respective neighborhoods through their vibrancy, economic activity, growth, diversification, and innovation. Notable winners include JPMorgan Chase's new global headquarters in New York City, Champlain condo rentals in Montreal, and Anduril Industries' "Arsenal-1" manufacturing campus in Columbus, Ohio.

feed.title: Why Riverview took an $11.4M hit to lift margin and earnings
feed.summary: Riverview Bancorp (NASDAQ: RVSB) has executed a strategic balance sheet optimization on March 25, 2026, selling $149.3 million of lower-yielding investment securities and realizing an estimated pre-tax loss of $11.4 million. The company expects this move to add approximately 25 basis points to its net interest margin and about $0.13 to its annual EPS once fully realized, with an earn-back period of less than 3.5 years. Riverview remains well-capitalized and stated no additional capital was required for this optimization.

feed.title: ICE First Look at Mortgage Performance: Prepayments Rise on Recent Refinance Activity and Serious Delinquencies Increase as Cure Rates Slow
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) reported a rebound in mortgage prepayment activity in February 2026, driven by recent refinance waves, with speeds up 14% month-over-month. Concurrently, the national delinquency rate edged higher due to seasonal increases in early-stage delinquencies and a notable rise in seriously past-due loans, although overall delinquency rates remain below pre-pandemic levels. The increase in seriously delinquent loans is primarily attributed to a slowdown in cure rates rather than a spike in new defaults, with FHA loans accounting for a significant portion of this rise.

feed.title: GE HealthCare to showcase comprehensive cardiology portfolio at ACC.26, including its latest AI-enabled imaging technologies, advanced software solutions, and key collaborations
feed.summary: GE HealthCare is set to showcase its comprehensive cardiology portfolio at ACC.26, highlighting AI-enabled imaging, advanced software solutions, and key collaborations. The company will feature its newly FDA-cleared Photonova Spectra photon-counting CT system, the ReadyFix fleet management solution for MAC VU360 ECG workstations, and a new partnership with Gentuity to enhance interventional cardiology. These innovations aim to improve precision care, operational efficiency, and diagnostic confidence for clinicians addressing cardiovascular disease.

feed.title: Synchrony and Figo Pet Insurance Partner to Streamline Claims Reimbursement for Pet Owners Through CareCredit
feed.summary: Synchrony and Figo Pet Insurance have formed a partnership to simplify claims reimbursement for pet owners using CareCredit. This collaboration allows approved Figo pet insurance claims to be directly credited to a customer's CareCredit account after they pay for veterinary services with their CareCredit card. This initiative aims to reduce financial stress for pet owners, streamline the reimbursement process, and benefit veterinary practices by expanding the accessibility of CareCredit.

feed.title: IURC investigates why energy bills are so high
feed.summary: The Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC) is investigating the high energy bills from CenterPoint Energy, Duke Energy, and three other utility companies. The companies cited rising construction/operating costs and intense weather as reasons for the increased expenses. Representative Alex Burton emphasized the need to invest in cheaper energy forms to lower monthly bills, and both Duke and CenterPoint have started efforts toward bill transparency.

feed.title: SLB expands Nvidia partnership to develop AI infrastructure for energy sector
feed.summary: Oilfield services company SLB is expanding its partnership with Nvidia to develop AI infrastructure and models specifically for the energy sector. This collaboration will see SLB become a design partner for modular AI data centers powered by Nvidia technology and work with the chip firm to create an "AI Factory for Energy," aimed at helping oil and gas producers and power companies leverage AI for operational data. The initiative addresses the energy industry's growing need to process vast amounts of data efficiently, cut costs, improve reliability, and lower emissions, especially as drilling demand slows.

feed.title: NYSE gives American Water the Closing Bell for its 140th anniversary
feed.summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK) is celebrating its 140th anniversary with its COO, Cheryl Norton, participating in NYSE programming, including the Closing Bell. The NYSE's daily update on March 25, 2026, also features the Opening Bell rung by Michael and Susan Dell with Invest America, discussing Treasury-backed investment accounts for children. Additionally, Verily Health CEO Stephen Gillett will discuss a recent $300 million investment round and its precision health AI strategy.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works stock faces scrutiny amid industrial slowdown signals and margin pressures in Q1
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) stock is under scrutiny due to weakening demand in key segments, with the US manufacturing PMI dipping below 50. The upcoming Q1 earnings report on April 29 will be crucial for investors to assess order backlogs, pricing power, and cost controls amid an uneven industrial recovery. Despite strong operational margins and financial health, ITW faces challenges from automotive production cuts and potential input cost inflation, making its diversified portfolio and defensive segments key to its performance.

feed.title: Alyssa Henry to Join PayPal's Board of Directors; Gail J. McGovern to Retire from Board
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. announced that Alyssa Henry, former CEO of Block's Square business, has joined its Board of Directors. Concurrently, Gail J. McGovern will retire from the Board after serving since 2015. Henry brings extensive experience in scaling commerce, payments, and technology platforms, which PayPal expects to be invaluable for its strategic growth.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp stock navigates AI chip demand surge amid inventory cycle pressures in 2026
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp is experiencing strong demand for its power management chips due to AI hyperscaler investments, offsetting weaker automotive markets. However, the company is also facing inventory adjustments in its automotive and industrial segments, creating valuation debates among investors. The article highlights both the opportunities presented by AI and the challenges from inventory cycles and competitive pressures, making it a critical watch for investors.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) Lowered to "Market Perform" Rating by BMO Capital Markets
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets downgraded Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) from an "outperform" to a "market perform" rating, setting a $52 price target. Despite the downgrade, ARE slightly beat quarterly earnings estimates, provided FY2026 guidance, and authorized a $500 million stock buyback. The broader analyst consensus for ARE remains a "Hold" with an average target price of $64.47.

feed.title: Globe Life Inc stock faces pressure amid regulatory scrutiny and sales practice overhaul
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (US3765361038) stock is under pressure due to a regulatory investigation by the Texas Department of Insurance into its sales practices, leading to policy suspensions and leadership changes. This scrutiny, which has involved allegations of forged documents and unauthorized enrollments, has impacted the company's revenue, causing its stock to drop. Despite an operational overhaul and strong capital levels, investor concerns remain over potential litigation costs, fines, and the time it will take to restore full sales capacity amidst an intensifying regulatory environment for the insurance sector.

feed.title: Super League Enterprise Inc expected to post a loss of $3.28 a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Super League Enterprise Inc (SLE) is projected to report a loss of $3.28 per share, according to a Refinitiv earnings preview. This information is based on forecasts for the company's financial performance.

feed.title: Precision Trading with Saratoga Investment Corp 8.125% Notes Due 2027 (SAY) Risk Zones
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily focuses on precision trading strategies for Saratoga Investment Corp's 8.125% Notes Due 2027 (NYSE: SAY). It outlines institutional trading strategies, including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, using AI-generated signals. The article highlights real-time signals, risk-reward ratios, and multi-timeframe analysis available to subscribers.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Fell 7% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s Why the Stock Could Rebound in 2026
feed.summary: Xcel Energy (XEL) shares have dropped 7% in the last 30 days, mainly due to rising bond yields challenging the appeal of dividend stocks and increasing borrowing costs for utilities. Despite this pressure, the company shows potential for a rebound in 2026, supported by its regulated rate base expansion, growing electricity demand from data centers, and its recognition as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies. Institutional ownership remains high, and analyst targets suggest moderate upside, indicating the stock may be modestly undervalued.

feed.title: Rimini Street helps firms optimize legacy IT systems
feed.summary: Rimini Street, Inc. helps companies optimize their existing IT systems and prepare them for innovation, especially concerning AI investments. A recent survey revealed that many CFOs are dissatisfied with technology investments due to rising costs and limited flexibility, stemming from a lack of clear strategic roadmaps and inadequate data infrastructure for AI. Rimini Street offers vendor-independent support and advisory services to address these challenges, freeing up funds for strategic initiatives like digital transformation and AI deployment.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley upgrades Prosus, sees 29% upside despite wider discount
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Prosus to "overweight" despite cutting its price target to €51, citing a significant upside of 29% from its current trading price. The brokerage noted that the holding discount has widened, presenting an attractive entry point for investors. Prosus's share buyback program, funded by Tencent sell-downs and cash, is tracking above previous estimates for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: KeyBanc initiates Reliance Steel stock with Overweight rating
feed.summary: KeyBanc initiated coverage on Reliance Steel & Aluminum (NYSE:RS) with an Overweight rating and a $341 price target, citing stronger pricing momentum. The firm increased its 2026 EBITDA and EPS estimates, forecasting higher volumes and pricing in the first quarter of 2026. This positive outlook comes despite recent downgrades from JPMorgan and BMO Capital due to margin pressures and increased administrative expenses.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PAYX) Paychex, Inc. Reports Q3 Revenue $1.81B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.78B
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. (PAYX) has reported its Q3 revenue at $1.81 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.78 billion. Concurrently, the company posted Q3 adjusted EPS of $1.71 per share, which was slightly below the FactSet estimate of $1.74. The article also mentions recent analyst rating adjustments and a new initiative by Paychex to unveil AI and agentic workforce management solutions.

feed.title: Micron launches tender offer for $5.4 billion in senior notes
feed.summary: Micron Technology Inc. has initiated cash tender offers for six series of its outstanding senior notes, totaling $5.4 billion, with maturities between 2031 and 2035. This debt refinancing comes as the company maintains a strong balance sheet and follows impressive fiscal Q2 2026 results, exceeding guidance and analyst expectations.

feed.title: KeyBanc assumes coverage on Ryerson stock with Sector Weight
feed.summary: KeyBanc has initiated coverage on Ryerson Holding Corp. with a "Sector Weight" rating following its merger with Olympic Steel Inc. The combined entity, now with a market capitalization of $1.09 billion, is projected by KeyBanc to achieve $1.52 billion to $1.58 billion in first-quarter 2026 revenue. Despite a recent earnings miss in Q4 2025, analysts anticipate 74% sales growth and a return to profitability for Ryerson in 2026.

feed.title: Paychex: Fiscal Q3 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Paychex Inc. (PAYX) reported strong fiscal third-quarter earnings, with net income reaching $560.3 million, or $1.56 per share. Adjusted earnings of $1.71 per share surpassed analyst expectations of $1.68, and the company's revenue of $1.81 billion also beat forecasts. This positive performance was attributed to the company's payroll processing and human resources services.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley resumes Constellation Energy stock at overweight on nuclear value
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has resumed coverage of Constellation Energy Corp. (NASDAQ:CEG) with an overweight rating and a price target of $385.00, implying a 30% upside. The firm highlights the company's significant upside potential from its large nuclear fleet, citing benefits like 24x7 clean baseload power, long asset lives, and expansion opportunities. Constellation Energy recently reported strong revenue growth in Q4 and is selling natural gas generation assets as part of a strategic adjustment.

feed.title: |​AbbVie stock price forecast for 2040: Immunology pipeline and oncology expansion support long-term path toward $550
feed.summary: AbbVie (ABBV) is currently trading around $204, down from its 52-week high, but its long-term outlook appears strong. The company's immunology pipeline, led by Skyrizi and Rinvoq, along with its expanding oncology business, are expected to drive significant revenue growth. Analysts project AbbVie could reach $550 by 2040, assuming consistent annual earnings growth and successful pipeline delivery.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific acquires Clario for nearly $8.9bn
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has completed the acquisition of Clario, a provider of endpoint data solutions for clinical trials, for approximately $8.875 billion in cash. The deal includes additional payments based on Clario's future performance and is expected to contribute positively to Thermo Fisher's operating margin, with significant synergies projected over five years. Clario's platform has supported a large percentage of new drug approvals by the EMA and FDA, integrating trial endpoint data from various sources to enhance drug development.

feed.title: SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc expected to post earnings of 12 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc is projected to report earnings of 12 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv earnings preview. The article provides a brief overview of the upcoming financial results for SBC.

feed.title: danaher2025annualreport.htm
feed.summary: Danaher's 2025 Annual Report highlights solid financial performance with $24.6 billion in revenue, 2% core revenue growth, and 4.5% adjusted EPS growth. The company generated $5.3 billion in free cash flow, marking its 34th consecutive year of free cash flow exceeding net income, enabling approximately $4 billion returned to shareholders. Strategic priorities for 2026 include accelerating growth, disciplined M&A, operational excellence, and investing in talent and AI capabilities, while the company anticipates higher sales growth in Diagnostics and modest improvement in Life Sciences end markets.

feed.title: Danaher (NYSE: DHR) 2026 proxy outlines governance, pay and $9.9B Masimo deal
feed.summary: Danaher's 2026 proxy statement details upcoming annual meeting proposals, including the election of directors, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, an advisory vote on executive compensation, and approval of amendments to the Omnibus Incentive Plan. The company highlights strong 2025 financial performance with $24.6 billion in sales and outlines its agreement to acquire Masimo Corporation for $9.9 billion. The proxy also emphasizes Danaher's commitment to robust corporate governance practices and a performance-based executive compensation program.

feed.title: Form 8-K CINTAS CORP For: Mar 25
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation filed a Form 8-K with the SEC on March 25, 2026, to announce its financial results for the quarter ended February 28, 2026. A press release detailing these results is furnished as Exhibit 99 to this Current Report and is incorporated by reference. The filing includes signatures from Scott A. Garula, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.

feed.title: ADOBE, INC. INVESTOR ALERT: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP Investigates Adobe, Inc.’s Directors and Officers for Breach of Fiduciary Duties – ADBE
feed.summary: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP has initiated an investigation into whether Adobe, Inc.'s directors and officers breached their fiduciary duties, potentially causing damages to the company and its shareholders. This probe follows a $150 million settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice over deceptive subscription practices and an investigation by the U.K. Competition and Markets Authority regarding cancellation fees. The firm is inviting Adobe common stock owners to participate in the investigation at no cost.

feed.title: Paychex Reports Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX) announced strong third-quarter results for fiscal year 2026, with double-digit revenue and operating income growth, and accelerated organic revenue growth. The company reported total revenue of $1.8 billion, a 20% increase, and diluted earnings per share of $1.56, up 9%. Paychex also returned over $1.5 billion to shareholders year-to-date and updated its fiscal 2026 outlook for interest on funds held for clients.

feed.title: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation reported strong fiscal 2026 third-quarter results, with an 8.9% increase in revenue to $2.84 billion and a diluted EPS of $1.24, up 9.7% year-over-year. The company achieved an all-time high gross margin of 51.0% and announced an agreement to acquire UniFirst Corporation, with expectations for significant shareholder and customer value. Cintas also raised its full fiscal year 2026 financial guidance for revenue and adjusted diluted EPS.

feed.title: Bondholders get 3 more days as IPALCO extends note consent vote
feed.summary: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. has extended the expiration time for its consent solicitations concerning its 4.25% Senior Notes due 2030 and 5.75% Senior Notes due 2034 to March 27, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. New York City time. As of the previous deadline, approximately 31% of the 2030 Notes and 25% of the 2034 Notes holders had provided consent, falling short of the majority threshold required for the proposed amendments. The company is offering aggregate consent payments of $1,187,500 for the 2030 Notes and $1,000,000 for the 2034 Notes, to be shared by consenting holders if conditions are met.

feed.title: ADOBE, INC. INVESTOR ALERT: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP Investigates Adobe, Inc.’s Directors and Officers for Breach of Fiduciary Duties – ADBE
feed.summary: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP has initiated an investigation into Adobe, Inc.'s directors and officers for potential breaches of fiduciary duties. This comes after a $150 million settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice regarding subscription practices and a U.K. Competition and Markets Authority investigation into cancellation fees. Shareholders are encouraged to join the investigation to explore potential damages suffered by Adobe and its shareholders.

feed.title: AI phone agents get 70 languages as IBM taps ElevenLabs voices
feed.summary: IBM and ElevenLabs announced an integration to bring ElevenLabs' Text to Speech and Speech to Text capabilities to IBM watsonx Orchestrate. This collaboration will provide premium voice quality across 70 languages and over 10,000 voices, empowering secure, scalable agentic AI experiences for various enterprise applications. The integration also includes enterprise protections like PCI compliance, Zero Retention Mode, and HIPAA support, allowing AI agents to communicate naturally and effectively while meeting stringent security and compliance requirements.

feed.title: Freeport to pay investors May 1 with $0.15-a-share dividend
feed.summary: Freeport (NYSE: FCX) has declared a cash dividend of $0.15 per share on its common stock, payable on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026. This dividend comprises a base dividend of $0.075 per share and a variable dividend of $0.075 per share, in line with the company's performance-based payout framework. Freeport is a leading international metals company focused on copper, operating diverse assets with significant reserves in copper, gold, and molybdenum across Indonesia, the U.S., and South America.

feed.title: SLB Expands NVIDIA Partnership To Build AI Infrastructure For Energy
feed.summary: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) has significantly expanded its partnership with NVIDIA to develop advanced AI infrastructure specifically for the energy industry. This collaboration aims to accelerate digital transformation within the energy sector by leveraging AI and machine learning technologies. The initiative will likely focus on optimizing operations, improving efficiency, and driving innovation across various energy exploration and production processes.
